title: Freelance AI Software Developer (AI SEO & Content Analytics)
description:
RebelAI (StartUp in Stealth Mode), Germany (Remote work with future migration opportunity)

About Us:

We are an innovative company specializing in leveraging artificial intelligence to enhance brand awareness and optimize content visibility across AI-driven search engines such as OpenAI, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and similar platforms. Our mission is to understand how questions and topics are ranked within large language models (LLMs) and design strategies to improve AI search engine optimization (AI SEO).

Job Description:

We are seeking a capable AI Software Developer with expertise in web scraping, data extraction, and machine learning for brand and content analysis. The role focuses on gathering data related to how various questions and topics are ranked and rated on AI-powered search platforms, analyzing the data to generate insights and statistics, and creating machine learning models to develop effective AI SEO strategies to enhance content discoverability.

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and manage web scraping tools to extract relevant data from AI search engines, content platforms, and ranking tools related to brand mentions, topic visibility, and search query performance.
- Build robust data pipelines to clean, process, and store large datasets enabling detailed analysis.
- Conduct statistical analysis to understand how questions, topics, and content perform and are ranked in AI-driven environments.
- Design and implement machine learning models to predict content ranking, identify optimization opportunities, and recommend strategies for AI SEO improvement.
- Collaborate closely with marketing and product teams to translate analytics into actionable content and SEO strategies.
- Monitor, evaluate, and report on the effectiveness of AI SEO efforts and adjust models and methods accordingly.
- Ensure compliance with ethical standards and legal requirements during data collection and processing.
- Maintain clear documentation of tools, methods, and processes used for data collection, analysis, and AI model development.

Required Skills and Qualifications:

- Experience with web scraping frameworks and libraries such as BeautifulSoup, Scrapy, Selenium, or equivalent.
- Strong proficiency in Python and relevant libraries for data analysis (Pandas, NumPy), machine learning (Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch).
- Expertise in database management for storing and querying large datasets (SQL, NoSQL).
- Solid background in statistics and data science methods for analysis and insight generation.
- Experience with machine learning, especially in predictive modeling and recommendation systems related to SEO and content analysis.
- Familiarity with AI search engines (e.g., OpenAI API, ChatGPT, Perplexity) and their ranking mechanisms is a significant advantage.
- Strong analytical mindset with an ability to transform data into business strategies.
- Excellent communication skills in English; Russian skills are a plus but not mandatory.
- Self-motivated, capable of handling remote freelance work independently while meeting deadlines.

Desirable:

- Prior experience in digital marketing, SEO, or AI content optimization.
- Knowledge of cloud computing environments (AWS, Google Cloud).
- Understanding of modern content management systems (CMS) and SEO tools.
- Interest in AI advancements and natural language processing (NLP).

 Work Arrangement:

- Remote freelance contract with flexible hours.
- After 1 year of successful collaboration, support for migration to Germany will be provided for long-term engagement.
    - We will help you with the Visa for Germany
    - You will also get your own apartment with two bedrooms 
    - The apartment would be part of your work agreement for the first year.
    - We would agree with you on a reasonable price for renting the apartment.
        
Application Process:

Please submit your CV and portfolio highlighting relevant AI, web scraping, and SEO projects, plus a cover letter explaining your approach to analyzing and improving AI-driven search rankings.

We would also appreciate a small introduction video, if you are interested.

We are seeking a highly specialized ML/Data Engineer to rapidly build the data core and predictive modeling engine for our Minimum Viable Product (MVP). This role is focused on the Measurement and Verification (M&V) of energy savings and the initial rules-based setpoint optimizer for pilot sites.
Key Responsibilities (The MVP Deliverables)

Build robust, scalable Python-based APIs to pull time-series data from external sources (e.g., weather APIs like OpenWeatherMap, utility data portals).
Design the PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB database schema to efficiently store and query hourly energy consumption, temperature, and BMS log data.
- M&V and Baseline Modeling:
Develop the Simple Regression Model (e.g., Piecewise Linear Regression) using Scikit-learn to establish the energy baseline (what the building would have used).
Implement the IPMVP Option C protocol logic to accurately calculate and verify energy savings: Savings = Predicted Baseline - Actual Consumption.
- Optimization Logic (MVP):
Translate simple predictive forecasts (e.g., weather, holiday schedule) into rules-based logic for HVAC setpoint adjustments.
Design the JSON/REST API structure required to communicate these setpoint commands to the building's gateway/BMS layer.
- Cloud Deployment:
Set up and maintain the core Python application and database on AWS or GCP (using minimal resources for the MVP).
- Required Skills & Experience
Expert Proficiency in Python and its data science ecosystem (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn).
Proven experience working with time-series data and PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB.
Familiarity with Energy Data (e.g., interval metering, utility APIs, weather data normalization).
Experience in REST API development (using Flask or FastAPI).
Prior experience in Cleantech, IoT, or Energy Management is a significant asset.
Strong understanding of statistical modeling concepts (regression analysis).

Please provide your resume, a brief overview of a relevant data project (ideally involving energy or time-series data), and your estimated hourly rate/fixed-bid quote for the 3-month MVP scope.

title: PDF classification and image detection and cut out
description:
I need a program which can detect if a PDF page contains advertisements, and then cut out this advertisement as JPG files. It should then detect at least the phone number, and if possible also the company name and address. Note that it can't extract images from the PDF, because it might be even just scanned documents, so it needs to convert the PDF pages to images, and then extract the ads.

It must also detect the title of the PDF, which is not always encoded in the title attribute, so it needs to OCR this. And it must detect a few more attributes. I'll send you files as examples before you start the project, and the additional attributes.

Note there are also many PDFs with no ads at all. It should detect 99% right, and should find 99% of the ads, and cut it out accurately. It is no real cut out, the PDFs are not changed, only the JPGs are saved when running the program.

There are many PDFs, like 500,000, each with about 30 pages average. So I need a local program, because a LLM service would be too expensive, at least for the first classification. For the accurate cut out, maybe a LLM service could be used if needed, because most PDFs and pages have no ads.

title: Build a lightweight video ingest to extract information (ASR+OCR+beats) for ~200 video ads
description:
We have ~200 short ads (15–30s). I need a small Python/Docker pipeline that:
Frames: capture at 2 fps (plus scene-cut frames and extra samples in the first 3s).
ASR: run faster-whisper with word-level timestamps.
Shot detection: PySceneDetect (content) to propose beats.
OCR: PaddleOCR on sampled frames → overlay text (+ bbox + timestamps).
Light vision: first-frame type (face/product/text/scene) + logo-first-seen (template match is OK).

Outputs: write structured files per ad:

transcript.jsonl (start, end, text, words[])
frames.jsonl (t, frame_path, first_frame_type, logo_present)
ocr.jsonl (t, text, bbox, conf)
beats.json (list of start,end,label?)

features.json (hook_text, hook_t, cuts_0_3, logo_t, overlay_stats, cta_t…)

Deliverables:

CLI: ingest_ad.py --in path/to.mp4 --out out_dir/
Dockerfile + requirements.txt
README with how to run + schema docs

Small QC notebook: prints recall/timestamp error on a tiny labeled sample (I’ll give 10–20 labels: overlay intervals, logo time, CTA time)

Acceptance:

Overlay recall ≥99% for overlays ≥1.0s; ≥95% for ≥0.6s
Median timestamp error ≤250 ms for hook, logo, CTA
Runs at ~2 fps baseline and auto-samples more around scene cuts / first 3s
Deterministic outputs given a seed

Nice to have (bonus):
A tiny make_features.py that joins ingest with my performance CSV

Please include: 1–2 links to similar video ingest or OCR/ASR repos (not just screenshots), and a sentence on how you’d handle fast text flashes without cranking fps.

title: Climate Data Index Developer Needed
description:
I’m looking for an experienced developer or data scientist to build a simple MVP that creates a historical climate variability index using publicly available NOAA datasets.

The goal is to develop a working Python prototype that automatically processes multiple NOAA climate datasets and combines them into a single trend indicator showing how key global climate variables have changed over time.

The project will focus on aligning several long-term datasets—air temperature, sea surface temperature, precipitation, and tropical storm activity—comparing each to a modern baseline period, and generating a single composite time series.

Deliverables:

-  Retrieve and process four core NOAA datasets (air temperature, sea surface temperature, precipitation, tropical storms).

- Align all datasets to a common time window (1979 to 2025).

- Use the 1991 to 2020 period as the “normal” baseline for comparison.

- Calculate how much each year (1979 to 2025) differs from the average during 1991 to 2020 for each variable.

- Standardize these differences so all variables are on the same numerical scale (e.g., z-scores).

- Combine all standardized variables using equal weighting to produce a single composite index.

- Output a time-series dataset and a simple line chart showing how the index changes from 1979 to 2025.

- Provide a fully commented Jupyter notebook or Python script that reproduces the results step-by-step.

A short reference sheet listing the recommended NOAA datasets and access links is provided here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1EpOLteKOPSfbN58-OAljFfxsLMUJGapGFNWdoLUU_qE/edit?usp=sharing

title: AI Agent Needed for Fintech Software

About our Software: 

Our software is a B2B solution that small business owners can use to offer financing to their customers they offer products/services to. Our software ware uses AI to find the lenders then offers them to the business owners customer for them to chose from. Once the customers of the business owner has chosen the lending products they want we then have an AI model handle the applications and completing them. 

Phase 1:
We are looking to re-engineer our entire backend of our software and need a developer who can create an AI Agent/ Bot that can handle the applications. 

We will give the following:
- A Strict library of ~400 Lenders 
- Strict Qualifications for each category of lenders 
- Strict rules for each lender 
- A Strict order in which each series of lenders should be grouped 
- A Strict order in which these groups should be completed 

The data set will be a given data set for Phase 1. We will need a developer that can engineer a robust model/agent/bot that can execute these lenders without being blocked by captchas or firewalls of these lenders. We also need a developer that can be a master prompter and understand how to engineer an ideal algorithm for this product. 

We also need this model/agent/bot to be able to replicate the location or have a extremely solid IP location solution engineered in so that the bot/agent/model seems natural and does not get detected by sites as a bot. 

The software front end is already engineered and a lot of the micro services associated we simply need some one to quickly engineer and design this first model for the backend of our software and to work with our current front end and backend team. 

Our current tech stack is:
- Twillio: Used for OTP and also to create a system generated number for the model to capture OTP's and application updates to feed back to the portal
- Mailgun & Mailjet: Used for the internal email client and also to send and receive emails from lenders for statuses and OTP's from lenders 
- JSON: Format all applicants credit reports come in as 
- Node
- React 
- Python 
- AWS 
- Mongo DB 
- Stripe 

We are needing some one who's extremely proficient in this tech stack. This way we can easily plug this model/agent into our current software. We also want a model that can easily work and be quickly built as 100% of the data is given from the sites of each lender to the qualification and rules of each lender and more. 

Phase 2: 
We will want the model to be able to find new lenders, categorize them ins the bucket they belong, and find the most applicable data points to them for us to manually review, reinforce, and correct. Then be able to approve or deny them to be added into our data base 

Phase 3: 
We will want a model that can start to determine based on approval and denial data what data points are most effective across the board, within each lender, and overall getting smarter at deciding which lender best fits which credit profile 

Phase 4: 
A model that self reinforces, adds products to the data base without reinforcement and then knows ideally where users can get a strong approval or strong series of approvals. 

We are looking for someone ling term that we can hire immediately. There is detailed documentation on the data points that can be shared once interested. Please review the summarized attached document.

To get there, we are making AI and Data Science one of our primary competitive advantages.

We are looking for a true "full-stack" AI and Data Science leader to build this function from the ground up. This is not a typical AI engineering role. You will be a senior strategic partner reporting directly to me (the CMO) and working with the entire marketing leadership team. Your work will directly influence multi-million dollar business decisions—from optimizing marketing spend to identifying new markets for company acquisitions.

This is an extraordinary opportunity to build an entire AI infrastructure, own the data strategy, and fundamentally shape the future of our company.  

Core Responsibilities
As our founding AI Lead, you will be responsible for the full lifecycle of data science and AI integration across our entire organization:

1. Business Strategy & Market Expansion:
-Lead sophisticated market research, using data science to identify high-value zip codes for organic growth.
-Develop models to identify strategic geographic markets for acquisition. Your analysis will directly inform our M&A strategy and the deployment of tens of millions of dollars in capital.

2. Marketing & Customer Analytics:
-Develop AI models to monitor marketing performance data, proactively surfacing opportunities, anomalies, and insights our human team might miss.
-Build predictive models to deeply understand our customer data. You will answer the question: "What makes a high-value customer for each of our three trades?"

3. Operational & Financial Analysis:
-Partner with all departments (Finance, Operations, and our field technicians) to analyze job data, profit margins, and operational bottlenecks.
-Identify and execute AI projects that improve efficiency, profitability, and customer service across the entire company.
4. Hands-On AI Development & Integration:
-Design, build, and deploy practical AI solutions using modern technologies. 
-Act as our "full-stack" AI leader. You must have a strong bias for leveraging existing technologies, models, and APIs (like OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) where possible, and building custom solutions only when necessary.


Required Skills & Experience
This is a senior leadership role that is also hands-on. We need a "doer" who can also think like a CEO.
-Experience: 5-7+ years in a senior Data Science or AI/ML role, with a portfolio of projects that delivered measurable business value.
-Full-Stack Data Science: You are an expert in the entire data lifecycle: data collection, ETL, exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, model building (from predictive models to deep learning), and deployment.
-Modern AI & LLM Expertise: You must have hands-on experience with generative AI, LLMs, and RAG architecture. You should be able to discuss vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Chroma) and integrating LLM APIs as a core competency.
-Tech Stack:
---Expert: Python and its data science stack (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/PyTorch).
---Expert: SQL.
---Proficient: Experience with BI tools (we use PowerBI).
-Critical Skill: Business Acumen. This is a non-negotiable. You must be an expert at translating complex data insights into actionable, executive-level business recommendations. Your success will be measured in dollars and strategic wins, not just model accuracy.

Bonus Points:
-Experience in a multi-location B2C service industry (like home services).
-Experience in a high-growth, private equity (PE) backed environment.
-Experience managing junior data scientists or engineers.


Additional Requirements:
1. Must work 8am-5pm CST, with expanded hours when necessary.  
2. Must be willing to use Time Doctor for accountability tracking until a high level of trust is established.  
3. Must be a truly expert and professional communicator in both live video and written settings
3. We are chasing a big goal, and to reach it, our team has a culture of both having a lot of fun AND working with extreme urgency.  We do in one day what other companies take three weeks to accomplish. 

To Apply
Please submit a proper resume and a cover letter that specifically answers the following:
1. Describe a project where you used data science to directly influence a major business or financial decision (e.g., market expansion, M&A, or profitability analysis). What was the outcome?
2. Please review this recent proposal for a project, which would be your first task on my team, and briefly tell me, how would you approach building and deploying this system from scratch, including your preferred tech stack? https://docs.google.com/document/d/1u5tQQQTUE5O30KbLb8iZ-1gE7MXMAqu1G1ZK6O5sl9o/edit?usp=sharing 
3. What is your philosophy on "building vs. buying" when it comes to AI models and infrastructure for a company like ours?

title: Seeking Expert Python Mentor for 1-on-1 'Zero-to-Hero' Data Science Boot Camp
description:
I am a finance professional (buyside equity research) with zero prior coding experience.

My goal is to become proficient in Python over the next 3-4 months. I am not looking for a generic, self-paced video course. 

I am looking to hire an expert developer to act as a 1-on-1 mentor and guide, creating and executing a personalized, intensive "zero-to-hero" boot camp. 

This will require 8 hours a week (2 hours a day x 4 days a week) x 6 weeks of one-on-one Google Meets sessions where you will screen share and walk through live coding and development.

The ultimate purpose is so I can apply Python to data analysis, LLM workflows and ultimately design RAG systems within financial research. However, the immediate objective for this contract is for me to build a rock-solid foundation in Python from the ground up.

Responsibilities:

This is a mentorship and teaching role. Your primary responsibilities will be:
	
	• Curriculum Design: Collaborating with me to design a structured, 6-week learning path that takes me from "zero" to "proficient." The curriculum must be heavily weighted towards the data science stack, not web development.
	• 1-on-1 Sessions: Meeting 4 times per week via video call for direct instruction, pair programming, Q&A, and high-level conceptual discussions.
	• Rigorous Code Reviews: This is the most critical requirement. I will be writing code and completing projects, and I expect you to provide detailed, asynchronous feedback (e.g., on GitHub) to correct my errors, improve my style, and teach best practices.
	• Project-Based Guidance: Defining and guiding me through the development of 2-3 portfolio-worthy projects. These projects must be data-centric (e.g., pulling financial data via an API, analyzing a large CSV with Pandas, building a data-cleaning script).
	• On-Call Support: Acting as my primary resource when I get stuck (within reason). Your job is to "un-stick" me and teach me how to debug and think like a programmer.

Required Skills & Experience:
	• Expert-level proficiency in Python (5+ years of professional experience).
	• Crucial: Deep, practical experience with the Python data science stack: Pandas, NumPy, and libraries for API interaction (e.g., requests) and JSON data handling.
	• Provable experience in mentorship, teaching, or tutoring. You must have the patience and skill to explain complex concepts to a complete beginner.
	• Excellent, clear, and professional communication skills.
	• Proficiency with Git and GitHub (you will be teaching me this).
Major Bonuses (Preferred):
	• Experience in the finance industry or working with financial data.
	• Familiarity with AI/ML concepts or LLM libraries (e.g., LangChain, OpenAI API, vector databases).
	• A background in data science or data engineering.
Project Scope:
	• Duration: This will be an initial 3-month contract. I am looking for a long-term mentor, so a successful initial boot camp will very likely lead to an extended, ongoing engagement as I move into more advanced topics (LLMs, RAG).
	• Time Commitment: I expect to need 5-10 hours of your time per week, distributed between our live sessions and your asynchronous code reviews.
How to Apply:
To ensure you have read this posting, please begin your proposal with the word "PYTHONIC".
In your proposal, please provide:
	1. A brief description of your professional Python experience, focusing specifically on your work with the data stack (Pandas, NumPy, APIs).
	2. Details of your experience in teaching, tutoring, or mentorship. How do you approach teaching a total beginner?
	3. A short, high-level outline of the first 5 topics you would cover in "Week 1" to build my foundational knowledge.

title: Senior Python + AI Agent Developer (Industrial Data Applications)
description:
Description

We’re building the most advanced AI-powered platform for the industrial supply chain — connecting manufacturers, distributors, and rep firms through automation, structured data, and intelligent agents.

We need a senior-level Python developer who can implement and extend our existing AI architecture to power:
-Product cross-references and equivalents
-Project takeoffs and spec parsing
-Conversational chatbots (technical product support)
-Data extraction and transformation pipelines
-AI agent orchestration (multi-agent coordination)

You’ll work with a clean, modern codebase built on FastAPI, GraphQL (Strawberry), SQLAlchemy 2.0, and pydantic-ai, using structured outputs, async architecture, and dependency injection throughout.

Our system already includes full support for multi-tenancy, and we have AI forward infrastructure set up to support heavy AI workflods.


Responsibilities:

-Implement and extend existing AI agents (e.g. tabular, PDF-to-markdown, DTO converters)
-Build structured data transformations and product matching workflows using LLM + embeddings
-Develop backend APIs and services following Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design
-Work with GraphQL schemas, repositories, and service layers to expose new functionality
-Optimize data ingestion pipelines for product catalogs, specs, and distributor data
-Integrate OpenAI/Anthropic models with structured output validation via pydantic-ai

Requirements:

-Expert-level Python 3.10+ developer (async, dataclasses, type hints, modern syntax)
-Proven experience building AI agent systems, not just calling LLM APIs
-Strong background in data modeling, ETL, and vector embeddings
-Familiarity with FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Strawberry GraphQL, and PostgreSQL
-Comfortable working with multi-service architectures, dependency injection, and async testing

Nice to Have

-Experience with industrial, manufacturing, or supply chain data (BOMs, specs, product catalogs)
-Knowledge of ETIM/HDM standards or cross-referencing systems
-Familiarity with Modal, DuckDB, Polars, or Daytona
-Prior experience integrating AI assistants into business applications

title: AI / ML Engineer - Fluent English Required
description:
Job Type: Full-Time, Remote (Eastern or Central Time Zone)
Experience Level: Senior / Expert
Timezone: Must be available to work during US Eastern or Central business hours

About the Role

We are looking for a highly skilled AI Engineer with strong experience in Python and a passion for building intelligent systems. This is a full-time, long-term position where you’ll collaborate with a global team on cutting-edge AI/ML projects. You should be comfortable working with various AI frameworks, implementing machine learning models, and communicating technical ideas clearly and effectively.

You must have experience in building, training, and deploying machine learning models and should be comfortable working on both backend tasks and discussing complex technical ideas in clear English.

Must-Have Qualifications

Excellent spoken and written English — This is the #1 requirement. You’ll be communicating directly with team members and clients daily.

Proficiency in Python — Expertise in Python for developing machine learning and AI models, with experience using libraries like TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Keras, etc.

Strong knowledge of machine learning algorithms — Experience implementing and tuning various ML models such as classification, regression, clustering, and deep learning.

Experience with data preprocessing and feature engineering — Comfort in preparing, cleaning, and transforming data for training models.

Proficiency in AI frameworks — Knowledge of tools like TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, or scikit-learn for building and deploying machine learning models.

Experience with deep learning — Familiarity with neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, GANs, and transfer learning.

Experience with cloud platforms — Familiarity with AWS, Azure, or GCP for deploying models and handling AI infrastructure.

Strong understanding of AI/ML deployment pipelines — Experience with deploying, testing, and maintaining machine learning models in production environments.

Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines — Comfort in version control and managing deployment processes.

Bonus Skills

Natural Language Processing (NLP) — Experience working with NLP models like GPT, BERT, or other transformer-based models.

Familiarity with containerization — Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for containerized environments.

Data visualization — Ability to visualize and interpret machine learning results, using libraries such as Matplotlib, Seaborn, or Plotly.

Experience with MLOps — Familiarity with model versioning, tracking, and automating model deployments in production.

Knowledge of Reinforcement Learning (RL) or Generative AI (GenAI) technologies.

Working Hours

Must be able to work full-time (40 hrs/week) aligned with Eastern or Central US time zones.

Excellent communication and responsiveness are mandatory.

Why Join Us?

Full-time, long-term remote opportunity

Collaborative and supportive team

Competitive compensation

Work on challenging, high-impact projects that push the boundaries of AI technology.
